label: Curated Overall Prior
description: Conservative seed prior for general assistant quality until benchmark-specific refresh data is curated.
limitations: Not a direct benchmark measurement; used only as a source-labeled seed prior.

label: Curated Reasoning Prior
description: Conservative seed prior for reasoning-heavy work based on catalog priors and public leaderboard orientation.
limitations: Not a direct benchmark measurement; refresh tasks should replace with exact benchmark rows where available.

label: Curated Coding Prior
description: Conservative seed prior for coding tasks.
limitations: Not a direct benchmark measurement; intended as initial catalog coverage.

label: Curated Instruction Following Prior
description: Conservative seed prior for instruction adherence and controllability.
limitations: Not a direct benchmark measurement; exact eval sources should be added during refresh.

label: Curated Speed Prior
description: Conservative seed prior for perceived response speed.
limitations: Not a direct latency measurement; provider routing and load can change results.

label: Curated Cost Efficiency Prior
description: Seed score derived from source-backed token prices in the model catalog.
limitations: Excludes prompt caching, batches, region-specific discounts, tools, and provider promotions.

label: Curated Long Context Prior
description: Seed score derived from source-backed context windows in the model catalog.
limitations: Effective quality at maximum context is not guaranteed by nominal context length.

label: Curated Tool Use Prior
description: Conservative seed prior for tool calling and agent workflows.
limitations: Not a direct BFCL measurement for every model row.
